---
title: "Assembly_benchmark"

format:
  html:
    grid: 
      body-width: 1000px
      sidebar-width: 200px
      margin-width: 200px
    toc: true
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false

# Import libraries
pkgs <- c("tidyverse", "janitor", "scales", "rlang", "ggrepel", "broom.mixed","emmeans",
          "flextable", "ggpp", "knitr", "kableExtra", "ggpubr", "ggExtra", "ggpmisc", "see")

# install.packages(pkgs[!pkgs %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"]])
lapply(pkgs, library, character.only=TRUE)

# Set global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(results='hold', message=FALSE,
                      warning=FALSE, fig.show="hold",
                      out.width="100%", fig.align="center",
                      fig.width=10, fig.height=5,
                      dev=c("png", "svg", "pdf"), dpi=600)


```

## Load Functions

```{r}
#| label: load_functions

# Define helper functions

`%notin%` <- Negate(`%in%`)

# 95% Confidence Interval function

CI95 <- function(stde,sample.n){
  alpha <- 0.05
  degrees.freedom <- sample.n - 1
  t.score <- qt(p=alpha/2, df=degrees.freedom,lower.tail=F)
  CI <- t.score * stde
  return(CI)
}

# Set labels for plotting
display_labels <- c("flye"="Flye",
                      "hifiasm"="Hifiasm",
                      "canu"="Canu",
                      "raven"="Raven",
                      "shasta"="Shasta",
                      "nextdenovo"="NextDenovo",
                      "miniasm"="Miniasm",
                      "spades_short"="SPAdes Short",
                      "abyss_short"="ABySS Short",
                      "abyss_hybrid"="ABySS Hybrid",
                      "masurca"="MaSuRCA",
                      "spades_hybrid"="SPAdes Hybrid",
                      "pilon"="Pilon",
                      "polypolish"="Polypolish",
                      "racon"="Racon (BWA)",
                      "racon-mp2"="Racon (Minimap2)",
                      "flye_pilon"="Flye + Pilon",
                      "flye_polypolish"="Flye + Polypolish",
                      "flye_racon"="Flye + Racon (BWA)",
                      "flye_racon-mp2"="Flye + Racon (Minimap2)")

# Set color palette

colors_programs <- c("flye"="#59A14F",
                     "hifiasm"="#1F83B4",
                     "canu"="#C7519C",
                     "raven"="#A52A2A",
                     "shasta"="#8B7355",
                     "nextdenovo"="#8C564B",
                     "miniasm"="#7B68EE",
                     "spades_short"="#EDC948",
                     "abyss_short"="#FF7F0E",
                     
                     "abyss_hybrid"="#FFAA0E",
                     "masurca"="#8B4513",
                     "spades_hybrid"="#CD1076",
                     
                     "pilon"="#B22222",
                     "polypolish"="#00688B",
                     "racon"="#008B00",
                     "racon-mp2"="#FF7F0E",
                     "flye_pilon"="#B22222",
                     "flye_polypolish"="#00688B",
                     "flye_racon"="#008B00",
                     "flye_racon-mp2"="#FF7F0E")

# Parse elapsed time function (from sacct)
parse_elapsed <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- stringr::str_trim(x)
  ifelse(is.na(x) | x == "NA", NA_real_,
         ifelse(stringr::str_detect(x, "^[0-9]+-"),
                {
                  m <- stringr::str_match(x, "^(\\d+)-(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2}):(\\d{2})")
                  d <- as.numeric(m[, 2]); h <- as.numeric(m[, 3])
                  mi <- as.numeric(m[, 4]); s <- as.numeric(m[, 5])
                  d*86400 + h*3600 + mi*60 + s
                },
                {
                  m <- stringr::str_match(x, "^(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2}):(\\d{2})")
                  h <- as.numeric(m[, 2]); mi <- as.numeric(m[, 3]); s <- as.numeric(m[, 4])
                  h*3600 + mi*60 + s
                })
  )
}

# Combine stats for polishing approaches
combine_programs <- function(df, prog1, prog2) {
  # # Define variables for testing
  # df <- unified
  # prog1 <- "flye"
  # prog2 <- "pilon"
  
  combo_name <- paste0(prog1, "_", prog2)
  # collapse duplicates defensively
  p1 <- df %>% filter(!is.na(n50)) %>%
    filter(program == !!prog1) 

  p2 <- df %>% filter(!is.na(n50)) %>%
    filter(program == !!prog2) 

  # join on (sample, depth_np); keep depth_il from prog02
  combo <- p2 %>%
    right_join(p1, by=c("sample", "depth_np")) %>%
    transmute(
      strategy="polished",
      program=!!combo_name,
      sample,
      depth_np,
      depth_il=depth_il.x,
      n50=n50.x,
      ng50=ng50.x,
      reference_length=reference_length.x,
      ref_size_mbp=ref_size_mbp.x,
      ref_size=ref_size.x,
      ref_contigs=ref_contigs.x,
      gc_percent=gc_percent.x,
      busco_complete=busco_complete.x,
      busco_complete_diff=busco_complete_diff.x,
      genome_fraction_percent=genome_fraction_percent.x,
      mism_100kbp=mism_100kbp.x,
      indel_100kbp=indel_100kbp.x,
      length_err_pct=length_err_pct.x,
      maxrss_gb=pmax(maxrss_gb.x, maxrss_gb.y),
      ram_per_mb=pmax(ram_per_mb.x, ram_per_mb.y),
      time_per_mb=time_per_mb.x + time_per_mb.y,
      elapsed_sec=elapsed_sec.x + elapsed_sec.y,
    )
  
  return(combo)
}

# Data extraction and cleaning function
extract_data_simulated <- function(sacct_file, metrics_file, genome_sizes) {

  # # # Define file paths for testing
  # sacct_file   <- "files/all_sacct.csv"
  # metrics_file <- "files/quast_busco_results.tsv"
  # genome_sizes <- "files/ref_genome_metrics.csv"
  
  # Define strategies
  long_reads_strategy  <- c("flye", "hifiasm", "canu", "raven", "shasta", "nextdenovo", "miniasm")
  short_reads_strategy <- c("spades_short", "abyss", "abyss_short")
  hybrid_strategy      <- c("spades_hybrid", "masurca", "abyss_hybrid")
  polished_strategy    <- c("pilon", "polypolish", "racon", "racon-mp2")

  raw_sacct <- read_csv(sacct_file, col_types=cols()) %>% 
    mutate(JobName=str_replace_all(JobName, pattern=c("Hifiasm"="hifiasm",
                                                      "abyss-"="abyss_",
                                                          "_FLYE"  ="_NP",
                                                          "_10x"   ="_NP10x",
                                                          "_15x"   ="_NP15x",
                                                          "_20x"   ="_NP20x",
                                                          "_25x"   ="_NP25x",
                                                          "_30x"   ="_NP30x",
                                                          "_35x"   ="_NP35x",
                                                          "_40x"   ="_NP40x",
                                                          "_50x"   ="_NP50x",
                                                          "_60x"   ="_NP60x",
                                                          "_75x"   ="_NP75x",
                                                          "_100x"  ="_NP100x")))
  
  raw_metrics <- read_tsv(metrics_file, col_types=cols()) %>% 
    rename(JobName=Assembly) %>%
    mutate(JobName=str_replace_all(JobName, pattern=c("Hifiasm"="hifiasm",
                                                      "abyss-"="abyss_",
                                                          "_FLYE"  ="_NP",
                                                          "_10x"   ="_NP10x",
                                                          "_15x"   ="_NP15x",
                                                          "_20x"   ="_NP20x",
                                                          "_25x"   ="_NP25x",
                                                          "_30x"   ="_NP30x",
                                                          "_35x"   ="_NP35x",
                                                          "_40x"   ="_NP40x",
                                                          "_50x"   ="_NP50x",
                                                          "_60x"   ="_NP60x",
                                                          "_75x"   ="_NP75x",
                                                          "_100x"  ="_NP100x")))
  
  genome_sizes_df <- read_csv(genome_sizes, col_types=cols()) %>% 
    dplyr::select(Sample, RefSizeMbp=size_mbp, RefSize=size_bp, RefContigs=contigs)
  
  raw_metrics_reference <- raw_metrics %>%
    filter(str_detect(JobName, "reference")) %>% 
    select(JobName,
           busco_complete_ref     =busco_complete,
           busco_single_copy_ref  =busco_single_copy,
           busco_multi_copy_ref   =busco_multi_copy,
           busco_fragmented_ref   =busco_fragmented,
           busco_missing_busco_ref=busco_missing_busco,
           busco_avg_identity_ref =busco_avg_identity,
           busco_stop_codon_ref   =busco_stop_codon) %>%
    extract( # Extract relevant columns from JobName
      col  =JobName,
      into =c("Program", "Sample"),
      regex="^(.+?)(?=_GCF)_(GCF.+?)?$"
    ) %>% select(! Program )
  
  # Split the JobID into two parts: the main job ID and the batch job ID
  main <- raw_sacct %>% filter(!str_detect(JobID, "\\.batch$"))
  
  batch <- raw_sacct %>% 
    filter(str_detect(JobID, "\\.batch$")) %>%
    mutate(JobID=str_remove(JobID, "\\.batch$")) %>%
    select(JobID, MaxRSS_batch=MaxRSS)
  
  # Left-join the batch MaxRSS onto the main jobs
  unified <- main %>%
    left_join(batch, by="JobID") %>%
    mutate(
      MaxRSS=coalesce(MaxRSS_batch, MaxRSS),
      MaxRSS=parse_number(MaxRSS),
      MaxRSS_GB=MaxRSS / (1024^2)
    ) %>%
    select(-MaxRSS_batch) %>%
    group_by(JobName) %>%
    slice_max(Start, n=1, with_ties=FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    full_join(raw_metrics, by="JobName") %>% # Join with metrics
    filter(! str_detect(JobName, "reference")) %>%
    extract( # Extract relevant columns from JobName
      col  =JobName,
      into =c("Program", "Sample", "depthNP", "depthIL"),
      regex="^(.+?)(?=_GCF)_(GCF.+?)(?:_NP(\\d+x))?(?:_IL(\\d+x))?$"
    ) %>%
    full_join(genome_sizes_df, by="Sample") %>% # Join with genome sizes
    full_join(raw_metrics_reference, by="Sample") %>% # Join with reference metrics
    mutate(
      Program=str_to_lower(Program),
      depthNP=replace_na(parse_number(depthNP), 0),
      depthIL=replace_na(parse_number(depthIL), 0),
      Strategy=case_when(
        Program %in% long_reads_strategy ~ "long_reads",
        Program %in% short_reads_strategy ~ "short_reads",
        Program %in% hybrid_strategy ~ "hybrid",
        Program %in% polished_strategy ~ "polished"
      ),
      # Elapsed_sec=parse_elapsed(as.character(Elapsed)),
      Elapsed_sec=dplyr::coalesce(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Elapsed)), parse_elapsed(Elapsed)),
      Elapsed_min=Elapsed_sec / 60,
      MaxRSS_per_mb=MaxRSS_GB / RefSizeMbp, # Calculate MaxRSS per Mb of genome size
      Elapsed_per_mb=Elapsed_sec / RefSizeMbp, # Calculate Elapsed time per Mb of genome size
    ) %>%
    clean_names() %>% ## filter(start != "None") %>% # Remove jobs that haven't ended
    mutate(strategy=factor(strategy, levels=c("short_reads","long_reads","hybrid","polished")),
         program =factor(program),
         sample  =factor(sample),
         ng50    = as.numeric(ng50),
         depth_eff=case_when(
          strategy == "short_reads" ~ depth_il,
          strategy == "long_reads"  ~ depth_np,
          strategy == "hybrid"      ~ depth_il + depth_np,
          strategy == "polished"    ~ depth_il + depth_np
         ),
         # Fidelity to truth
         length_err_pct=100 * (total_length - reference_length) / reference_length,
         gc_err_abs    =abs(gc_percent - reference_gc_percent),
         busco_complete_diff   =busco_complete - busco_complete_ref,
         busco_single_copy_diff=busco_single_copy - busco_single_copy_ref,
         busco_multi_copy_diff =busco_multi_copy - busco_multi_copy_ref
           ) %>%
    rename(
      maxrss_gb=max_rss_gb,
      time_per_mb=elapsed_per_mb,
      ram_per_mb=max_rss_per_mb,
      mism_100kbp=number_mismatches_per_100_kbp,
      indel_100kbp=number_indels_per_100_kbp,
      misassemblies=number_misassemblies )
  
  
  df_flye_pilon <- combine_programs(unified, "flye", "pilon")
  df_flye_polypolish <- combine_programs(unified, "flye", "polypolish")
  df_flye_racon <- combine_programs(unified, "flye", "racon")
  df_flye_racon_mp2 <- combine_programs(unified, "flye", "racon-mp2")
  
  unified_full <- bind_rows(unified, df_flye_pilon, df_flye_polypolish, df_flye_racon, df_flye_racon_mp2) %>%
              mutate(program=factor(program))
  
  return(unified_full)
}
```

## Load Data

```{r}
#| label: load_data

# Extract and clean data
# For simulated data
data <- extract_data_simulated("files/all_sacct.csv",
                                "files/quast_busco_results.tsv",
                                "files/ref_genome_metrics.csv") %>% 
            filter(program != "shasta")

# Load reference genome metrics for simulated data
reference_metrics <- read_csv("files/ref_genome_metrics.csv", col_types=cols()) %>% 
  mutate(CDS_mb = CDS / size_mbp,
          gene_density = gene / size_mbp,
          cds_per_gene = CDS / gene,
          intron_mb = intron / size_mbp,
          mRNA_mb = mRNA / size_mbp,
          start_codon_mb = start_codon / size_mbp,
          stop_codon_mb = stop_codon / size_mbp) %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()

# Save the cleaned data to a CSV file
write_csv(data, "files/cleaned_metrics.csv")

```

## Summary statistics

```{r}
#| label: summary_stats

data_stats_single <- data %>%  filter(!is.na(n50)) %>%
  mutate(number_contigs_small = number_contigs_0_bp - number_contigs_1000_bp) %>%
  group_by(strategy, program, depth_eff) %>% 
  summarise(
    n=n(),
    med_n50        =median(n50, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_busco      =median(busco_complete, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_busco_diff =median(busco_complete_diff, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_genfrac    =median(genome_fraction_percent, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_mism       =median(mism_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_indel      =median(indel_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_len_err    =median(length_err_pct, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_maxrss_gb  =median(maxrss_gb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_ram_mb     =median(ram_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_time_mb    =median(time_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_sht_contig =median(number_contigs_small, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_n50       =mean(n50, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_ng50      =mean(ng50, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_busco     =mean(busco_complete, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_busco_diff=mean(busco_complete_diff, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_genfrac   =mean(genome_fraction_percent, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_mism      =mean(mism_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_indel     =mean(indel_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_len_err   =mean(length_err_pct, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_maxrss_gb =mean(maxrss_gb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_ram_mb    =mean(ram_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_time_mb   =mean(time_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_time      =mean(elapsed_sec, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_sht_contig=mean(number_contigs_small, na.rm=TRUE),
    CI_n50         =CI95(sd(n50)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_ng50        =CI95(sd(ng50)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_busco       =CI95(sd(busco_complete)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_busco_diff  =CI95(sd(busco_complete_diff)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_genfrac     =CI95(sd(genome_fraction_percent)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_mism        =CI95(sd(mism_100kbp)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_indel       =CI95(sd(indel_100kbp)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_len_err     =CI95(sd(length_err_pct)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_maxrss_gb   =CI95(sd(maxrss_gb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_ram_mb      =CI95(sd(ram_per_mb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_time_mb     =CI95(sd(time_per_mb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_time        =CI95(sd(elapsed_sec)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_sht_contig  =CI95(sd(number_contigs_small)/sqrt(n),n),
    .groups="drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(color=colors_programs[as.character(program)]) %>% 
  filter(strategy %notin% c("hybrid", "polished")) %>% 
  arrange(depth_eff, program)

data_stats_multi <- data %>% filter(!is.na(n50)) %>% 
  mutate(number_contigs_small = number_contigs_0_bp - number_contigs_1000_bp) %>%
  group_by(strategy, program, depth_np, depth_il) %>%
  summarise(
    n=n(),
    med_n50        =median(n50, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_busco      =median(busco_complete, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_busco_diff =median(busco_complete_diff, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_genfrac    =median(genome_fraction_percent, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_mism       =median(mism_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_indel      =median(indel_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_len_err    =median(length_err_pct, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_maxrss_gb  =median(maxrss_gb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_ram_mb     =median(ram_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_time_mb    =median(time_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_sht_contig =median(number_contigs_small, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_n50       =mean(n50, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_ng50      =mean(ng50, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_busco     =mean(busco_complete, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_busco_diff=mean(busco_complete_diff, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_genfrac   =mean(genome_fraction_percent, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_mism      =mean(mism_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_indel     =mean(indel_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_len_err   =mean(length_err_pct, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_maxrss_gb =mean(maxrss_gb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_ram_mb    =mean(ram_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_time_mb   =mean(time_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_time      =mean(elapsed_sec, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_sht_contig=mean(number_contigs_small, na.rm=TRUE),
    CI_n50         =CI95(sd(n50)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_ng50        =CI95(sd(ng50)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_busco       =CI95(sd(busco_complete)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_busco_diff  =CI95(sd(busco_complete_diff)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_genfrac     =CI95(sd(genome_fraction_percent)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_mism        =CI95(sd(mism_100kbp)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_indel       =CI95(sd(indel_100kbp)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_len_err     =CI95(sd(length_err_pct)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_maxrss_gb   =CI95(sd(maxrss_gb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_ram_mb      =CI95(sd(ram_per_mb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_time_mb     =CI95(sd(time_per_mb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_time        =CI95(sd(elapsed_sec)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_sht_contig  =CI95(sd(number_contigs_small)/sqrt(n),n),
    .groups="drop"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(color=colors_programs[as.character(program)]) %>% { . ->> data_stats_full } %>% 
  filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid", "polished"), n > 20) %>% 
  arrange(depth_np, depth_il, program) 
```

## Reference characteristics

```{r}
#| label: reference_characteristics

colors <- data.frame (
  light  = c("lightblue", "darkolivegreen2", "coral" , "mediumorchid2", "turquoise"),
  dark   = c("darkblue" , "darkolivegreen4", "coral4", "magenta4"     , "turquoise4")
)

reference_metrics %>% 
  summarise(
    min_size_mbp = min(size_mbp),
    max_size_mbp = max(size_mbp),
    mean_size_mbp= mean(size_mbp),
    median_size_mbp= median(size_mbp),
    sd_size_mbp  = sd(size_mbp),
    min_contigs  = min(contigs),
    max_contigs  = max(contigs),
    mean_contigs = mean(contigs),
    median_contigs= median(contigs),
    sd_contigs   = sd(contigs),
    min_gc_content= min(gc_content),
    max_gc_content= max(gc_content),
    mean_gc_content= mean(gc_content),
    median_gc_content= median(gc_content),
    sd_gc_content= sd(gc_content),
    min_gene     = min(gene),
    max_gene     = max(gene),
    mean_gene    = mean(gene),
    median_gene  = median(gene),
    sd_gene      = sd(gene)
  ) %>% 
  kable(format="html", table.attr='class="table table-striped"', caption="Reference Genome Characteristics") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width=F, position="left", font_size=9)
  
plot_metric <- function(metric, y_label, colors) {
  box_fill <- colors$light
  jitter_color <- colors$dark
  
  reference_metrics %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x="", y=!!sym(metric))) +
    # geom_violin(width=1, fill=box_fill) +
    geom_violinhalf(color=jitter_color, fill=box_fill, alpha=0.7) +
    geom_boxplot(width=0.3, fill=jitter_color, alpha=0.9, outliers = T) +
    # geom_jitter(width=0.1, alpha=0.5, color=jitter_color) +
    labs(x="", y=y_label) +
    theme_minimal(base_size=10) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())
}

order_metrics <- c("cds"= "CDS",
                  "intron"="Introns",
                  "gene"= "Genes")
reference_metrics %>% 
    select(sample, size_mbp, gene, cds, intron, m_rna) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols=c(gene, cds, intron),
                 names_to="feature", values_to="count") %>%
    group_by(sample) %>% mutate(feature=factor(feature, levels=c("cds", "intron", "gene"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=size_mbp, y=count, fill = feature, color = feature)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.7) +
  stat_poly_line() +
  stat_poly_eq(label.y = c(0.9,0.85,0.8), label.x = 0.05) +
  labs(x="", y="# Features (x1000)") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/1000),
                     breaks = seq(0, 150e3, by = 25e3)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors$dark, name="Feature", labels=order_metrics) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=colors$light, name="Feature", labels=order_metrics) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin=unit(c(0,0.25,-0.5,0.25), "cm"),
        legend.position="top",
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin()) -> plot_reference_features

reference_metrics %>% 
    select(sample, size_mbp) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=size_mbp, y=" ")) +
  geom_boxplot(fill="darkgoldenrod1", color="darkorange4", width=0.75, outlier.color = "darkorange4") +
  labs(x="Size (Mbp)", y=" ") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
        plot.margin=unit(c(0,0.25,0.25,0.70), "cm")) -> plot_reference_size

ggarrange(
  ggarrange(plot_reference_features, plot_reference_size,
          ncol=1, nrow=2, heights = c(5,1)),
    plot_metric("contigs", "# Contigs", colors[4,]),
    plot_metric("gc_content", "GC Content (%)", colors[5,]),
  ncol=3, nrow=1, labels=c("A", "B", "C"), widths = c(5,1,1)) -> plot_reference_characteristics
```

## Stats Single

```{r}
#| label: stats_single

sig_stars <- function(p) dplyr::case_when(
  is.na(p)       ~ "",
  p < 0.001      ~ "***",
  p < 0.01       ~ "**",
  p < 0.05       ~ "*",
  p < 0.1        ~ ".",
  TRUE           ~ ""
)

data_full <- data %>% left_join(reference_metrics, by="sample") %>% 
    mutate(across(c(size_mbp, gc_content, gene_density, cds_per_gene), scale))

data_single <- data_full %>% filter(strategy %notin% c("hybrid", "polished"))

data_multi <- data_full %>% filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid", "polished"),
                              program %notin% c("pilon", "polypolish"))

responses <- c(
    "n50"        ="n50",
    "ng50"       ="ng50",
    "busco"      ="busco_complete",
    "busco_diff" ="busco_complete_diff",
    "genfrac"    ="genome_fraction_percent",
    "mism"       ="mism_100kbp",
    "indel"      ="indel_100kbp",
    "len_err"    ="length_err_pct",
    "maxrss_gb"  ="maxrss_gb",
    "ram_mb"     ="ram_per_mb",
    "time_mb"    ="time_per_mb",
    "time"       ="elapsed_sec")

# Make a lmer formula
mk_form <- function(response, rhs) {
  as.formula(sprintf("%s ~ %s", response, rhs), env=parent.frame())
}

fit_program_single <- function(df, response, program_name) {

  dff <- df %>%
    filter(program == program_name) %>%
    drop_na(all_of(response))

  fml <- as.formula(paste(
    response,
    "~ depth_eff * (size_mbp + gc_content + gene_density + cds_per_gene)",
    "+ (1 | sample)"
  ))

  mod <- lme4::lmer(fml, data=dff)

  list(
    model = mod,
    anova = anova(mod, type = 3),
    fixed = broom.mixed::tidy(mod, effects="fixed", conf.int=TRUE),
    program = program_name,
    response = response
  )
}

fit_block_single <- function(df, response) {
  
  dff <- df %>%
    drop_na(all_of(response))
  
  depth_grid <- sort(unique(dff$depth_eff))
  
  rhs_single <- "program * depth_eff +
(ref_size + gc_percent + gene_density + cds_per_gene) +
program:(ref_size + gc_percent + gene_density + cds_per_gene) +
depth_eff:(ref_size + gc_percent + gene_density + cds_per_gene) +
(1 | sample)"
  
  fml <- mk_form(response, rhs_single)

  mod <- lme4::lmer(fml, data=dff)
  
  anova_global_tbl <- car::Anova(mod, type = 3) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  rename(
    df = Df,
    chi_sq = Chisq,
    p_value = `Pr(>Chisq)`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    signif = sig_stars(p_value),
    response = response,
    .before=1
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_value)

  emm_depth_by_program <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    ~ depth_eff | program,
    type = "response"
  )
  
  depth_trends_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(
    mod,
    ~ program,
    var = "depth_eff"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    rename(
      slope = depth_eff.trend,
      df = df,
      t_ratio = z.ratio,
      p_value = p.value
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p_value),
      response = response,
      .before=1
    )
  
  emm_prog_by_depth <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    ~ program | depth_eff
  )
  
  prog_pairs_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(
    emm_prog_by_depth,
    method = "tukey"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "program_at_depth",
      .before=1
    )

  emm_depth_by_program <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    ~ depth_eff | program,
    at = list(depth_eff = depth_grid)
  )
  
  depth_pairs_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(
    emm_depth_by_program,
    method = "tukey"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "depth_within_program",
      .before=1
    )
  
  genome_trends_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(
    mod,
    ~ program,
    var = "ref_size"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      covariate = "ref_size",
      response = response,
      .before=1
    )

  return(
    list(
      model = mod,
      global_effects = anova_global_tbl,
      depth_slopes   = depth_trends_tbl,
      genome_slopes  = genome_trends_tbl,
      prog_pairs     = prog_pairs_tbl,
      depth_pairs    = depth_pairs_tbl,
      fixed = broom.mixed::tidy(mod, effects="fixed", conf.int=TRUE),
      response = response
    )
  )
}

fits <- purrr::imap(
  responses,
  ~ fit_block_single(data_single, response = .x)
)

tbls <- imap_dfr(
  fits,
  ~ tibble(
    response_id = .y,
    global_effects = list(.x$global_effects),
    depth_slopes   = list(.x$depth_slopes),
    genome_slopes  = list(.x$genome_slopes),
    prog_pairs     = list(.x$prog_pairs),
    depth_pairs    = list(.x$depth_pairs)
  )
)

all_global_effects <- tbls %>% select(response_id, global_effects) %>% unnest(global_effects)
all_depth_slopes   <- tbls %>% select(response_id, depth_slopes)   %>% unnest(depth_slopes)
all_genome_slopes  <- tbls %>% select(response_id, genome_slopes)  %>% unnest(genome_slopes)
all_prog_pairs     <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs)     %>% unnest(prog_pairs)
all_depth_pairs    <- tbls %>% select(response_id, depth_pairs)    %>% unnest(depth_pairs)

write_csv(all_global_effects, "results/simulated_single_global_effects.csv")
write_csv(all_depth_slopes, "results/simulated_single_depth_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_genome_slopes, "results/simulated_single_genome_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs, "results/simulated_single_prog_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_depth_pairs, "results/simulated_single_depth_pairs.csv")
```

## Stats Hybrid/Polished

```{r}
#| label: stats_hybrid_polished

sig_stars <- function(p) dplyr::case_when(
  is.na(p)       ~ "",
  p < 0.001      ~ "***",
  p < 0.01       ~ "**",
  p < 0.05       ~ "*",
  p < 0.1        ~ ".",
  TRUE           ~ ""
)

data_full <- data %>% left_join(reference_metrics, by="sample") %>% 
    mutate(across(c(size_mbp, gc_content, gene_density, cds_per_gene), scale))

data_polished <- data_full %>% filter(strategy %in% c("polished"),
                              program %notin% c("pilon", "polypolish", "racon", "racon-mp2"))

data_hybrid <- data_full %>% filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid") | program == "flye_polypolish",
                              program %notin% c("pilon", "polypolish", "racon", "racon-mp2"))

data_multi <- data_full %>% filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid", "polished"),
                              program %notin% c("pilon", "polypolish", "racon", "racon-mp2"))
responses <- c(
    "n50"        ="n50",
    "ng50"       ="ng50",
    "busco"      ="busco_complete",
    "busco_diff" ="busco_complete_diff",
    "genfrac"    ="genome_fraction_percent",
    "mism"       ="mism_100kbp",
    "indel"      ="indel_100kbp",
    "len_err"    ="length_err_pct",
    "maxrss_gb"  ="maxrss_gb",
    "ram_mb"     ="ram_per_mb",
    "time_mb"    ="time_per_mb",
    "time"       ="elapsed_sec")

# Make a lmer formula
mk_form <- function(response, rhs) {
  as.formula(sprintf("%s ~ %s", response, rhs), env=parent.frame())
}

fit_block_multi_depths <- function(df, response,
                                  depth_np_var = "depth_np",
                                  depth_il_var = "depth_il",
                                  use_log_depth = FALSE) {
  # # # Set up variables for testing
  # df <- data_polished
  # response <- "mism_100kbp"
  # depth_np_var <- "depth_np"
  # depth_il_var <- "depth_il"
  # use_log_depth = F
  
  
  dff <- df %>%
    drop_na(all_of(response))

  # Optional transforms (recommended if depth effects are nonlinear)
  if (use_log_depth) {
    dff <- dff %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        depth_np_tr = log1p(.data[[depth_np_var]]),
        depth_il_tr = log1p(.data[[depth_il_var]])
      )
    depth_np_term <- "depth_np_tr"
    depth_il_term <- "depth_il_tr"
  } else {
    depth_np_term <- depth_np_var
    depth_il_term <- depth_il_var
  }

  # Depth grids for EMMs
  depth_np_grid <- sort(unique(dff[[depth_np_var]]))
  depth_il_grid <- sort(unique(dff[[depth_il_var]]))

  # --- MODEL RHS ---
  rhs <- sprintf(
    "program * %s * %s +
     (ref_size + gc_percent + gene_density + cds_per_gene) +
     program:(ref_size + gc_percent + gene_density + cds_per_gene) +
     %s:(ref_size + gc_percent + gene_density + cds_per_gene) +
     %s:(ref_size + gc_percent + gene_density + cds_per_gene) +
     (1 | sample)",
    depth_np_term, depth_il_term,
    depth_np_term, depth_il_term
  )

  fml <- mk_form(response, rhs)
  mod <- lme4::lmer(fml, data = dff)

  # --- GLOBAL EFFECTS (Type III Wald chi-square) ---
  anova_global_tbl <- car::Anova(mod, type = 3) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("term") %>%
    dplyr::rename(df = Df, chi_sq = Chisq, p_value = `Pr(>Chisq)`) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(signif = sig_stars(p_value),
                  response = response,
                  .before = 1) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(p_value)

  # --- SIMPLE SLOPES (two: NP slope and IL slope) ---
  depth_np_slopes_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(mod, ~ program, var = depth_np_term) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::rename(
      slope = !!paste0(depth_np_term, ".trend"),
      z_ratio = z.ratio,
      p_value = p.value
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p_value),
      response = response,
      slope_type = "np",
      .before = 1
    )

  depth_il_slopes_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(mod, ~ program, var = depth_il_term) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::rename(
      slope = !!paste0(depth_il_term, ".trend"),
      z_ratio = z.ratio,
      p_value = p.value
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p_value),
      response = response,
      slope_type = "il",
      .before = 1
    )

  depth_slopes_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(depth_np_slopes_tbl, depth_il_slopes_tbl)

  # --- PROGRAM PAIRWISE COMPARISONS at each (NP, IL) combo ---
  # Warning: can get large. Use with care if many depth combinations.
  emm_prog_by_depths <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    as.formula(sprintf("~ program | %s * %s", depth_np_var, depth_il_var)),
    pbkrtest.limit = 50000,
    at = rlang::list2(
      !!depth_np_var := depth_np_grid,
      !!depth_il_var := depth_il_grid
    )
  )
  
  prog_pairs_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(emm_prog_by_depths, method = "tukey") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "program_at_depth_np_il",
      .before = 1
    )
  
  
  # --- PROGRAM PAIRWISE COMPARISONS at avarage depth ---
  emm_prog_avg_depth <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    as.formula(sprintf("~ program | %s * %s", depth_np_var, depth_il_var)),
    pbkrtest.limit = 50000
  )
  
  prog_pairs_avg_depth_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(emm_prog_avg_depth, method = "tukey") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "program_averaged_over_depth",
      .before = 1
    )
  

  # --- DEPTH PAIRWISE COMPARISONS within program (two useful views) ---

  # (A) short-reads depth contrasts within each program, at each NP depth
  emm_il_by_program_np <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    as.formula(sprintf("~ %s | program * %s", depth_il_var, depth_np_var)),
    at = rlang::list2(!!depth_np_var := depth_np_grid,
                      !!depth_il_var := depth_il_grid)
  )

  il_pairs_within_np_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(emm_il_by_program_np, method = "tukey") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "illumina_depth_within_program_at_np",
      .before = 1
    )

  # (B) long-reads depth contrasts within each program, at each IL depth
  emm_np_by_program_il <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    as.formula(sprintf("~ %s | program * %s", depth_np_var, depth_il_var)),
    at = rlang::list2(!!depth_np_var := depth_np_grid,
                      !!depth_il_var := depth_il_grid)
  )

  np_pairs_within_il_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(emm_np_by_program_il, method = "tukey") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "nanopore_depth_within_program_at_il",
      .before = 1
    )

  # --- GENOME SLOPES (same as before; can add more covariates similarly) ---
  genome_trends_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(mod, ~ program, var = "ref_size") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      covariate = "ref_size",
      response = response,
      .before = 1
    )

  list(
    model = mod,
    global_effects = anova_global_tbl,
    depth_slopes   = depth_slopes_tbl,
    genome_slopes  = genome_trends_tbl,
    prog_pairs     = prog_pairs_tbl,
    prog_pairs_avg_depth = prog_pairs_avg_depth_tbl,
    il_depth_pairs = il_pairs_within_np_tbl,
    np_depth_pairs = np_pairs_within_il_tbl,
    fixed = broom.mixed::tidy(mod, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE),
    response = response
  )
}

# Polished only
fits <- purrr::imap(
  responses,
  ~ fit_block_multi_depths(data_polished, response = .x, use_log_depth = F)
)

tbls <- imap_dfr(
  fits,
  ~ tibble(
    response_id    = .y,
    global_effects = list(.x$global_effects),
    depth_slopes   = list(.x$depth_slopes),
    genome_slopes  = list(.x$genome_slopes),
    prog_pairs     = list(.x$prog_pairs),
    prog_pairs_avg = list(.x$prog_pairs_avg_depth),
    il_depth_pairs = list(.x$il_depth_pairs),
    np_depth_pairs = list(.x$np_depth_pairs)
  )
)

all_global_effects <- tbls %>% select(response_id, global_effects) %>% unnest(global_effects)
all_depth_slopes   <- tbls %>% select(response_id, depth_slopes)   %>% unnest(depth_slopes)
all_genome_slopes  <- tbls %>% select(response_id, genome_slopes)  %>% unnest(genome_slopes)
all_prog_pairs     <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs)     %>% unnest(prog_pairs)
all_prog_pairs_avg <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs_avg) %>% unnest(prog_pairs_avg)
all_il_depth_pairs <- tbls %>% select(response_id, il_depth_pairs) %>% unnest(il_depth_pairs)
all_np_depth_pairs <- tbls %>% select(response_id, np_depth_pairs) %>% unnest(np_depth_pairs)

write_csv(all_global_effects, "results/simulated_nolimit_polished_global_effects.csv")
write_csv(all_depth_slopes,   "results/simulated_nolimit_polished_depth_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_genome_slopes,  "results/simulated_nolimit_polished_genome_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs,     "results/simulated_nolimit_polished_prog_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs_avg, "results/simulated_nolimit_polished_prog_pairs_avg_depth.csv")
write_csv(all_il_depth_pairs, "results/simulated_nolimit_polished_il_depth_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_np_depth_pairs, "results/simulated_nolimit_polished_np_depth_pairs.csv")

# Hybrid only + Polished (flye_polypolish)
fits <- purrr::imap(
  responses,
  ~ fit_block_multi_depths(data_hybrid, response = .x, use_log_depth = F)
)

tbls <- imap_dfr(
  fits,
  ~ tibble(
    response_id    = .y,
    global_effects = list(.x$global_effects),
    depth_slopes   = list(.x$depth_slopes),
    genome_slopes  = list(.x$genome_slopes),
    prog_pairs     = list(.x$prog_pairs),
    prog_pairs_avg = list(.x$prog_pairs_avg_depth),
    il_depth_pairs = list(.x$il_depth_pairs),
    np_depth_pairs = list(.x$np_depth_pairs)
  )
)

all_global_effects <- tbls %>% select(response_id, global_effects) %>% unnest(global_effects)
all_depth_slopes   <- tbls %>% select(response_id, depth_slopes)   %>% unnest(depth_slopes)
all_genome_slopes  <- tbls %>% select(response_id, genome_slopes)  %>% unnest(genome_slopes)
all_prog_pairs     <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs)     %>% unnest(prog_pairs)
all_prog_pairs_avg <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs_avg) %>% unnest(prog_pairs_avg)
all_il_depth_pairs <- tbls %>% select(response_id, il_depth_pairs) %>% unnest(il_depth_pairs)
all_np_depth_pairs <- tbls %>% select(response_id, np_depth_pairs) %>% unnest(np_depth_pairs)

write_csv(all_global_effects, "results/simulated_nolimit_hybrid_global_effects.csv")
write_csv(all_depth_slopes,   "results/simulated_nolimit_hybrid_depth_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_genome_slopes,  "results/simulated_nolimit_hybrid_genome_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs,     "results/simulated_nolimit_hybrid_prog_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs_avg, "results/simulated_nolimit_hybrid_prog_pairs_avg_depth.csv")
write_csv(all_il_depth_pairs, "results/simulated_nolimit_hybrid_il_depth_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_np_depth_pairs, "results/simulated_nolimit_hybrid_np_depth_pairs.csv")

# Hybrid + Polished
fits <- purrr::imap(
  responses,
  ~ fit_block_multi_depths(data_multi, response = .x, use_log_depth = F)
)

tbls <- imap_dfr(
  fits,
  ~ tibble(
    response_id    = .y,
    global_effects = list(.x$global_effects),
    depth_slopes   = list(.x$depth_slopes),
    genome_slopes  = list(.x$genome_slopes),
    prog_pairs     = list(.x$prog_pairs),
    prog_pairs_avg = list(.x$prog_pairs_avg_depth),
    il_depth_pairs = list(.x$il_depth_pairs),
    np_depth_pairs = list(.x$np_depth_pairs)
  )
)

all_global_effects <- tbls %>% select(response_id, global_effects) %>% unnest(global_effects)
all_depth_slopes   <- tbls %>% select(response_id, depth_slopes)   %>% unnest(depth_slopes)
all_genome_slopes  <- tbls %>% select(response_id, genome_slopes)  %>% unnest(genome_slopes)
all_prog_pairs     <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs)     %>% unnest(prog_pairs)
all_prog_pairs_avg <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs_avg) %>% unnest(prog_pairs_avg)
all_il_depth_pairs <- tbls %>% select(response_id, il_depth_pairs) %>% unnest(il_depth_pairs)
all_np_depth_pairs <- tbls %>% select(response_id, np_depth_pairs) %>% unnest(np_depth_pairs)

write_csv(all_global_effects, "results/simulated_nolimit_multi_global_effects.csv")
write_csv(all_depth_slopes,   "results/simulated_nolimit_multi_depth_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_genome_slopes,  "results/simulated_nolimit_multi_genome_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs,     "results/simulated_nolimit_multi_prog_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs_avg, "results/simulated_nolimit_multi_prog_pairs_avg_depth.csv")
write_csv(all_il_depth_pairs, "results/simulated_nolimit_multi_il_depth_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_np_depth_pairs, "results/simulated_nolimit_multi_np_depth_pairs.csv")
```

## Figures - Non-Hybrid and Non-Polished

```{r}
#| label: figures_not_hybrid
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5

program_order <- c("abyss_short", "spades_short", "flye", "hifiasm",
                   "canu", "raven", "shasta", "nextdenovo", "miniasm")

data_stats_single_plt <- data_stats_single %>%
  mutate(depth_eff=factor(depth_eff),
         program=factor(program, levels=program_order)) 

# N50 plot
plt_n50_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
  arrange(CI_n50, program) %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_n50, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_n50 - CI_n50), ymax=(mean_n50 + CI_n50)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1e-6)) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="N50 (Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank()) 

# NG50 plot
plt_ng50_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
   arrange(CI_ng50, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_ng50, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ng50 - CI_ng50), ymax=(mean_ng50 + CI_ng50)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F,  position = position_dodge(width=0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1e-6)) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="NG50 (Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank()) 

# Mismatches plot
plt_mism_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>% 
  arrange(CI_mism, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_mism, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_mism - CI_mism), ymax=(mean_mism + CI_mism)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Mismatches(/100kb)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Indels plot
plt_indel_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>% 
  arrange(CI_indel, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_indel, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_indel - CI_indel), ymax=(mean_indel + CI_indel)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Indels (/100kb)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Genome Fraction plot
plt_genfrac_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>% 
  arrange(CI_genfrac, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_genfrac, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_genfrac - CI_genfrac), ymax=(mean_genfrac + CI_genfrac)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Recovered (%)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Length error plot
plt_len_err_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
  arrange(CI_len_err, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_len_err, color=program)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50") +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_len_err - CI_len_err), ymax=(mean_len_err + CI_len_err)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Length error (%)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-5,5)) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# BUSCO difference plot
plt_busco_diff_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
  arrange(CI_busco_diff, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_busco_diff, color=program)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50") +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_busco_diff - CI_busco_diff), ymax=(mean_busco_diff + CI_busco_diff)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="BUSCO difference", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-5,5)) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Max RAM plot
plt_maxrss_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
  arrange(CI_maxrss_gb, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_maxrss_gb, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_maxrss_gb - CI_maxrss_gb), ymax=(mean_maxrss_gb + CI_maxrss_gb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Max RAM (GB)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Max RAM per Mbp plot
plt_ram_mb_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
  arrange(CI_ram_mb, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_ram_mb, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ram_mb - CI_ram_mb), ymax=(mean_ram_mb + CI_ram_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Max RAM (GB/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Time plot
plt_time_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
  arrange(CI_time, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_time, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time - CI_time), ymax=(mean_time + CI_time)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Time (min)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Exclude Canu from time plot (too high)
plt_time_no_canu_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>% filter(program != "canu") %>%
  arrange(CI_time, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_time, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time - CI_time), ymax=(mean_time + CI_time)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/3600)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Time (h)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Time per Mbp plot
plt_time_mb_single <-data_stats_single_plt %>%
  arrange(CI_time_mb, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_time_mb, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time_mb - CI_time_mb), ymax=(mean_time_mb + CI_time_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Time (s/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Exclude Canu from time per Mbp plot (too high)
plt_time_mb_no_canu_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>% filter(program != "canu") %>%
  arrange(CI_time_mb, program) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_time_mb, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time_mb - CI_time_mb), ymax=(mean_time_mb + CI_time_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60,75,100)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Time (s/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank()) 
```

## Figures - Polished vs Flye

```{r}
#| label: polished_vs_flye
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5

flye_polished <- full_join(data_stats_single, data_stats_multi) %>% 
                    mutate(depth_np=ifelse(is.na(depth_np), depth_eff, depth_np),
                               depth_il=ifelse(is.na(depth_il), 100, depth_il)) %>%
                  filter(program %in% c("flye", "flye_polypolish", "flye_pilon", "flye_racon", "flye_racon-mp2"), depth_np <= 100, depth_il <= 100) %>%
                  mutate(program=factor(program, levels=c("flye_racon", "flye_racon-mp2", "flye_polypolish", "flye_pilon","flye"))) %>% 
                  arrange(program)

flye_polished_split <- full_join(data_stats_single, data_stats_multi) %>% 
                    mutate(depth_np=ifelse(is.na(depth_np), depth_eff, depth_np),
                               depth_il=ifelse(is.na(depth_il), 0, depth_il)) %>%
                  filter(depth_np <= 100, depth_il <= 100) %>%
                  mutate(program=factor(program)) %>% 
                  arrange(program)

colors_tmp <- c(colors_programs)
colors_tmp[["flye"]] <- "#000000"

plt_n50_polished <- flye_polished %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_n50, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il)), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_n50 - CI_n50), ymax=(mean_n50 + CI_n50)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1e-6)) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_tmp, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="N50 (Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_mism_polished <- flye_polished %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_mism, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il)), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_mism - CI_mism), ymax=(mean_mism + CI_mism)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_tmp, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Mismatches(/100kb)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_indel_polished <- flye_polished %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_indel, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il)), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_indel - CI_indel), ymax=(mean_indel + CI_indel)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_tmp, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Indels (/100kb)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_len_err_polished <- flye_polished %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_len_err, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50") +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il)), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_len_err - CI_len_err), ymax=(mean_len_err + CI_len_err)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_tmp, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Length error (%)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_busco_diff_polished <- flye_polished %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_busco_diff, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50") +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il)), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_busco_diff - CI_busco_diff), ymax=(mean_busco_diff + CI_busco_diff)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_tmp, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="BUSCO difference", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_genfrac_polished <- flye_polished %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_genfrac, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il)), position = "identity") +
  geom_point(size=2, position = "identity") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_genfrac - CI_genfrac), ymax=(mean_genfrac + CI_genfrac)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F, position = "identity") +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_tmp, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Recovered (%)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_polished_split_maxrss_gb <- function(program_name,title){
  flye_program <- paste0("flye_", program_name)
  
  flye_polished_split %>% filter(program %in% c("flye", !!flye_program, !!program_name)) %>%
    mutate(program=factor(program, levels = c(!!flye_program, !!program_name, "flye")),
           depth_il=factor(depth_il), depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np)) %>%
    arrange(program) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_maxrss_gb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
    geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
    geom_point(size=2) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_maxrss_gb - CI_maxrss_gb), ymax=(mean_maxrss_gb + CI_maxrss_gb)),
                  linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
    #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
    scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("olivedrab4","firebrick3","black"), label=c("Flye + Polisher", "Polisher", "Flye"), name="Program") +
    labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB)", title=title) +
    theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
    theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
          legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin()) + 
    guides(color=guide_legend(reverse=T))
}

plt_polished_maxrss_racon      <- plt_polished_split_maxrss_gb("racon", "Racon (BWA)")
plt_polished_maxrss_pilon      <- plt_polished_split_maxrss_gb("pilon", "Pilon")
plt_polished_maxrss_polypolish <- plt_polished_split_maxrss_gb("polypolish", "Polypolish")
plt_polished_maxrss_racon_mp2  <- plt_polished_split_maxrss_gb("racon-mp2", "Racon (Minimap2)")

plt_polished_split_ram_mb <- function(program_name,title){
  flye_program <- paste0("flye_", program_name)
  
  flye_polished_split %>% filter(program %in% c("flye", !!flye_program, !!program_name)) %>% 
    mutate(program=factor(program, levels = c(!!flye_program, !!program_name, "flye")),
           depth_il=factor(depth_il), depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np)) %>%
    arrange(program) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_ram_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
    geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
    geom_point(size=2) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ram_mb - CI_ram_mb), ymax=(mean_ram_mb + CI_ram_mb)),
                  linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
    #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
    scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("olivedrab4","firebrick3","black"), label=c("Flye + Polisher", "Polisher", "Flye"), name="Program") +
    labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB/Mbp)", title=title) +
    theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
    theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
          legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin()) + 
    guides(color=guide_legend(reverse=T))
}

plt_polished_ram_mb_racon      <- plt_polished_split_ram_mb("racon", "Racon (BWA)")
plt_polished_ram_mb_pilon      <- plt_polished_split_ram_mb("pilon", "Pilon")
plt_polished_ram_mb_polypolish <- plt_polished_split_ram_mb("polypolish", "Polypolish")
plt_polished_ram_mb_racon_mp2  <- plt_polished_split_ram_mb("racon-mp2", "Racon (Minimap2)")

plt_polished_split_time_mb <- function(program_name,title){
  flye_program <- paste0("flye_", program_name)
  
  flye_polished_split %>% filter(program %in% c("flye", !!flye_program, !!program_name)) %>% 
    mutate(program=factor(program, levels = c(!!flye_program, !!program_name, "flye")),
           depth_il=factor(depth_il), depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np)) %>%
    arrange(program) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_time_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
    geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
    geom_point(size=2) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time_mb - CI_time_mb), ymax=(mean_time_mb + CI_time_mb)),
                  linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
    #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
    scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
    #scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60), breaks=c(0,30,60,90,120)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,30,60,90,120)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("cyan4","firebrick3","black"), label=c("Flye + Polisher", "Polisher", "Flye"), name="Program") +
    labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Time (s/Mbp)", title=title) +
    theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
    theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
          legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin()) + 
    guides(color=guide_legend(reverse=T))
}

plt_polished_time_mb_racon      <- plt_polished_split_time_mb("racon", "Racon (BWA)")
plt_polished_time_mb_pilon      <- plt_polished_split_time_mb("pilon", "Pilon")
plt_polished_time_mb_polypolish <- plt_polished_split_time_mb("polypolish", "Polypolish")
plt_polished_time_mb_racon_mp2  <- plt_polished_split_time_mb("racon-mp2", "Racon (Minimap2)")
```

## Figures - Hybrid and Polished

### N50

```{r}
#| label: hybrid_n50
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5


stats_hybrid_plot <- data_stats_multi %>%
                      filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid", "polished"),
                             program %notin% c("pilon", "racon", "polypolish","racon-mp2"),
                             program %notin% c("flye_pilon", "flye_racon","flye_racon-mp2"),
                             depth_np <= 100 ,depth_il <= 100) %>% 
                      mutate(program=factor(program, levels=c("abyss_hybrid", "spades_hybrid", "masurca", "flye_polypolish")))

plt_n50_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_n50, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_n50, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_n50 - CI_n50), ymax=(mean_n50 + CI_n50)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1e-6)) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="N50 (Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_n50_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_n50, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_n50, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_n50 - CI_n50), ymax=(mean_n50 + CI_n50)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1e-6)) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="N50 (Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
```

### Mismatches

```{r}
#| label: hybrid_mismatches
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5

plt_mism_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_mism, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_mism, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_mism - CI_mism), ymax=(mean_mism + CI_mism)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Mismatches(/100kb)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_mism_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_mism, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_mism, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_mism - CI_mism), ymax=(mean_mism + CI_mism)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Mismatches(/100kb)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
```

### Indels

```{r}
#| label: hybrid_indels
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5


plt_indel_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_indel, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_indel, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_indel - CI_indel), ymax=(mean_indel + CI_indel)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Indels (/100kb)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_indel_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_indel, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_indel, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_indel - CI_indel), ymax=(mean_indel + CI_indel)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Indels (/100kb)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
```

### Max RAM

```{r}
#| label: hybrid_max_ram
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5


plt_ram_mb_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_ram_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_ram_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ram_mb - CI_ram_mb), ymax=(mean_ram_mb + CI_ram_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_ram_mb_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_ram_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
  filter(depth_np %in% c(10,30,50,100)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_ram_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ram_mb - CI_ram_mb), ymax=(mean_ram_mb + CI_ram_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_ram_mb_hybrid_xil_full <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_ram_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_ram_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ram_mb - CI_ram_mb), ymax=(mean_ram_mb + CI_ram_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_maxrss_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_maxrss_gb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_maxrss_gb, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_maxrss_gb - CI_maxrss_gb), ymax=(mean_maxrss_gb + CI_maxrss_gb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_maxrss_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_maxrss_gb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_maxrss_gb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_maxrss_gb - CI_maxrss_gb), ymax=(mean_maxrss_gb + CI_maxrss_gb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
```

### Run time

```{r}
#| label: hybrid_time
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5

plt_time_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_time_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_time, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time - CI_time), ymax=(mean_time + CI_time)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/3600)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Time (h)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_time_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_time_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_time, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time - CI_time), ymax=(mean_time + CI_time)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/3600)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Time (h)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_time_mb_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_time_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_time_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time_mb - CI_time_mb), ymax=(mean_time_mb + CI_time_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Time (s/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_time_mp_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_time_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
  filter(depth_np %in% c(10,30,50,100)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_time_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time_mb - CI_time_mb), ymax=(mean_time_mb + CI_time_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0,60,120,180,240,300)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Time (s/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_time_mp_hybrid_xil_full <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_time_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_time_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time_mb - CI_time_mb), ymax=(mean_time_mb + CI_time_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Time (s/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

```

### Length error

```{r}
#| label: hybrid_len_err
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5

plt_len_err_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_len_err, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_len_err, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50") +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
```
