```{r}
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_len_err - CI_len_err), ymax=(mean_len_err + CI_len_err)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Length error (%)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_len_err_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_len_err, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_len_err, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50") +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_len_err - CI_len_err), ymax=(mean_len_err + CI_len_err)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Length error (%)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

# ggarrange(plt_len_err_hybrid_xnp, plt_len_err_hybrid_xil, ncol=2, labels=c("A", "B"),
#           common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

### Busco difference

```{r}
#| label: hybrid_busco_diff
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5

plt_busco_diff_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_busco_diff, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_busco_diff, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50") +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_busco_diff - CI_busco_diff), ymax=(mean_busco_diff + CI_busco_diff)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="BUSCO difference", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_busco_diff_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_busco_diff, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_busco_diff, color=program, alpha=depth_np,)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50") +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program,depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_busco_diff - CI_busco_diff), ymax=(mean_busco_diff + CI_busco_diff)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="BUSCO difference", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
```

### Genome recovery

```{r}
#| label: hybrid_genome_recovery
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5

plt_genfrac_hybrid_xnp <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_genfrac, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_genfrac, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_genfrac - CI_genfrac), ymax=(mean_genfrac + CI_genfrac)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(90,100)) +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Recovered (%)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_genfrac_hybrid_xil <- stats_hybrid_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_genfrac, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_genfrac, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_genfrac - CI_genfrac), ymax=(mean_genfrac + CI_genfrac)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(90,100)) +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Recovered (%)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
```

## Figures - Hybrid and Polished

```{r}
#| label: hybrid_polished_resources
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5

stats_multi_plot <- data_stats_multi %>%
                      filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid", "polished"),
                             program %notin% c("pilon", "racon", "polypolish","racon-mp2"),
                             program %notin% c("flye_pilon", "flye_racon","flye_racon-mp2"),
                             depth_np <= 100 ,depth_il <= 100)

plt_time_multi_xil <- stats_multi_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_time, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
  filter(depth_np %in% c(10,30,50,100)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_time, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time - CI_time), ymax=(mean_time + CI_time)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/3600)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Time (h)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_time_multi_xil_full <- stats_multi_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_time, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_time, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time - CI_time), ymax=(mean_time + CI_time)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/3600)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Time (h)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_time_multi_xnp <- stats_multi_plot %>% 
  arrange(CI_time, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
  filter(depth_il %in% c(10,30,50,100)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_time, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time - CI_time), ymax=(mean_time + CI_time)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/3600)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Time (h)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_time_mp_multi_xil <- stats_multi_plot %>% 
  arrange(CI_time_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
  filter(depth_np %in% c(10,30,50,100)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_time_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time_mb - CI_time_mb), ymax=(mean_time_mb + CI_time_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Time (s/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_time_mp_multi_xil_full <- stats_multi_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_time_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_time_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time_mb - CI_time_mb), ymax=(mean_time_mb + CI_time_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Time (s/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_ram_mb_multi_xnp <- stats_multi_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_ram_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
  filter(depth_il %in% c(10,30,50,100)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_ram_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ram_mb - CI_ram_mb), ymax=(mean_ram_mb + CI_ram_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_ram_mb_multi_xil <- stats_multi_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_ram_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
  filter(depth_np %in% c(10,30,50,100)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_ram_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ram_mb - CI_ram_mb), ymax=(mean_ram_mb + CI_ram_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_ram_mb_multi_xil_full <- stats_multi_plot %>% 
  arrange(CI_ram_mb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_ram_mb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ram_mb - CI_ram_mb), ymax=(mean_ram_mb + CI_ram_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_maxrss_multi_xnp <- stats_multi_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_maxrss_gb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_il=as.numeric(depth_il), depth_np=factor(depth_np)) %>%
  filter(depth_il %in% c(10,30,50,100)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_np, y=mean_maxrss_gb, color=program, alpha=depth_il)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_il))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_maxrss_gb - CI_maxrss_gb), ymax=(mean_maxrss_gb + CI_maxrss_gb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth short-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth long-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_maxrss_multi_xil <- stats_multi_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_maxrss_gb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
  filter(depth_np %in% c(10,30,50,100)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_maxrss_gb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_maxrss_gb - CI_maxrss_gb), ymax=(mean_maxrss_gb + CI_maxrss_gb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

plt_maxrss_multi_xil_full <- stats_multi_plot %>%
  arrange(CI_maxrss_gb, program) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=as.numeric(depth_np), depth_il=factor(depth_il)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_maxrss_gb, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_maxrss_gb - CI_maxrss_gb), ymax=(mean_maxrss_gb + CI_maxrss_gb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,50,100)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth short-reads (x)", y="Max RAM (GB)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
```

## Publication Figures

### References Characteristics

```{r}
#| label: figS1_plt_reference_characteristics
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 4
#| fig-cap: "Figure: Characteristics of the reference genomes used in the assembly benchmark. (A) Number of genes, coding sequences (CDS), and introns versus genome size (in box-plot). (B) Distribution of contig counts. (C) Distribution of GC content."
#| cache: false
plot_reference_characteristics
```

### Strategy: Single

```{r}
#| label: fig1_strategy_single_metrics
#| fig.width: 11
#| fig.height: 11
#| fig-cap: "Figure: Assembly quality metrics for single assembly strategies. Panels show (A) N50, (B) genome fraction, (C) BUSCO difference, (D) length error, (E) mismatches per 100 kbp, and (F) indels per 100 kbp for each assembly program as a function of nanopore sequencing depth. Note that panels B-F have been zoomed in for better visualization, leaving Miniasm not visible in panels E and F. Complete graphs can be found in Figure S1."

plotA <- plt_n50_single + guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=1))
plotB <- plt_genfrac_single + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(90,100))
plotC <- plt_busco_diff_single + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,0))
plotD <- plt_len_err_single + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,5))
plotE <- plt_mism_single + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,20))
plotF <- plt_indel_single + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,10))

# Strategy: Single 
ggarrange(plotA, plotB, plotC,
          plotD, plotE, plotF,
          ncol=2, nrow=3, labels=c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: figS2_strategy_single_metrics_sup
#| fig.width: 11
#| fig.height: 11
#| fig-cap: "Figure: Complete assembly quality metrics for single assembly strategies. Panels show (A) N50, (B) genome fraction, (C) BUSCO difference, (D) length error, (E) mismatches per 100 kbp, and (F) indels per 100 kbp for each assembly program as a function of nanopore sequencing depth. This figure shows the complete graphs for all metrics, while Figure 1 has been zoomed in for better visualization."

plotA <- plt_n50_single + guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=1))
plotB <- plt_genfrac_single
plotC <- plt_busco_diff_single
plotD <- plt_len_err_single
plotE <- plt_mism_single 
plotF <- plt_indel_single

# Strategy: Single
ggarrange(plotA, plotB, plotC,
          plotD, plotE, plotF,
          ncol=2, nrow=3, labels=c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig2_strategy_single_resource
#| fig.width: 11
#| fig.height: 5
#| fig-cap: "Figure: Normalized resource usage per Mbp of assembly for single assembly strategies. Panels show (A) maximum RAM usage per Mbp of assembly and (B) run time per Mbp of assembly for each assembly program as a function of nanopore sequencing depth. Note the restricted y-axis on Panel B for better visualization. Complete and unnormalized graphs can be found in Figure S2."

plotA <- plt_ram_mb_single + guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=1))
plotB <- plt_time_mb_single + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,3.5*60)) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,0.5,1,2,3.5)*60, labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60))

ggarrange(plotA, plotB,
          ncol=2, nrow=1, labels=c("A", "B"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")

```

```{r}
#| label: figS3_strategy_single_resource_sup
#| fig.width: 11
#| fig.height: 4
#| fig-cap: "Supplementary Figure S: Resource usage for single assembly strategies. Panels show (A) run time, (B) run time per Mbp of assembly (C) unnormalized maximum RAM for each assembly program as a function of nanopore sequencing depth. Canu has been included in this complete graph."

breaksA <- c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40)*3600
breaksB <- c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30,40)*60

plotA <- plt_time_single + scale_y_continuous(breaks=breaksA, 
                                              labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60)) + guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=1))
plotB <- plt_time_mb_single + scale_y_continuous(breaks=breaksB,
                                                  labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60))
plotC <- plt_maxrss_single  + guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=1))
# plotB <- plt_time_single + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,2*3600)) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,0.25,0.5,1,2)*3600, labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60))

ggarrange(plotA, plotB, plotC,
          ncol=3, labels=c("A", "B", "C"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

### Strategy: Polishing

```{r}
#| label: fig3_strategy_polished_metrics
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5
#| fig-cap: "Figure 3: Assembly quality metrics for polished Flye assemblies. Panels show (A) mismatches per 100Kb of the original and (B) indels per 100Kb of the original for each program. X-axis indicates long-reads depth, and alpha transparency indicates short-reads depth."

plotA <- plt_mism_polished + scale_x_discrete(limits = c("10","15","20")) + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,6))
plotB <- plt_mism_polished + scale_x_discrete(limits = c("25","30","35","40","50","60", "75", "100")) + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,4))
plotC <- plt_indel_polished + scale_x_discrete(limits = c("10","15","20")) + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,6))
# ggarrange(plotA, plotB, plotC, plotD,
#           ncol=4, labels=c("A","B", "C", "D"), widths = c(0.5,1,0.5,1),
#           common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")

ggarrange(plt_mism_polished + guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=1, reverse=T)),
          plt_indel_polished,
          ncol=2, labels=c("A","B"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig4_strategy_polished_resources_maxrss_split
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 8
#| fig-cap: "Figure: Normalized maximum RAM usage per Mbp for polished assembly strategies. Panels show (A) Racon eith BWA-MEM2, (B) Racon with Minimap2, (C) Pilon, and (D) Polypolish. X-axis indicates short-reads depth, and alpha transparency indicates long-reads depth."

ggarrange(plt_polished_ram_mb_racon + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,0.6)),
          plt_polished_ram_mb_racon_mp2 + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,0.6)),
          plt_polished_ram_mb_pilon + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,0.6)),
          plt_polished_ram_mb_polypolish + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,0.6)),
          ncol=2,nrow=2, labels=c("A", "B", "C", "D"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig5_strategy_polished_resources_time_split
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 8
#| fig-cap: "Figure: Normalized run time per Mbp for polished assembly strategies. Panels show (A) Racon eith BWA-MEM2, (B) Racon with Minimap2, (C) Pilon, and (D) Polypolish. X-axis indicates short-reads depth, and alpha transparency indicates long-reads depth."

ggarrange(plt_polished_time_mb_racon + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,120)),
          plt_polished_time_mb_racon_mp2 + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,120)),
          plt_polished_time_mb_pilon + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,150)),
          plt_polished_time_mb_polypolish + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,120)),
          ncol=2,nrow=2, labels=c("A", "B", "C", "D"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig_strategy_polished_resources_maxrss_split_sup
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 8
#| fig-cap: "Figure: Unnormalized maximum RAM usage for polished assembly strategies. Panels show (A) Racon eith BWA-MEM2, (B) Racon with Minimap2, (C) Pilon, and (D) Polypolish. X-axis indicates short-reads depth, and alpha transparency indicates long-reads depth."
#| eval: false

ggarrange(plt_polished_maxrss_racon + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,23)),
          plt_polished_maxrss_racon_mp2 + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,23)),
          plt_polished_maxrss_pilon + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,15)),
          plt_polished_maxrss_polypolish + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,23)),
          ncol=2,nrow=2, labels=c("A", "B", "C", "D"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")

```

```{r}
#| label: fig4_strategy_polished_metrics_sup
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 8
#| fig-cap: "Supplementary Figure S2: Assembly quality metrics for polished Flye assemblies. Panels show (A) N50, (B) length error, (C) BUSCO difference, and (D) recovered percentage for each program. X-axis indicates long-reads depth, and alpha transparency indicates short-reads depth."

ggarrange(plt_n50_polished + guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=1, reverse=T)),
          plt_len_err_polished,
          plt_busco_diff_polished, plt_genfrac_polished,
          ncol=2, nrow=2, labels=c("A", "B", "C", "D"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

### Strategy: Hybrid

```{r}
#| label: fig6_strategy_hybrid_metrics
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig-cap: "Figure 4: Assembly quality metrics for hybrid assembly strategies. Panels show (A) N50, (B) genome fraction, (C) BUSCO difference, (D) length error, (E) mismatches per 100 kbp, and (F) indels per 100 kbp for each assembly program as a function of nanopore sequencing depth. X-axis indicates short-reads depth, and alpha transparency indicates long-reads depth. Note that that the Panel C, E & F y-axis has been limited for better visualization, full graph can be found in Figure S3."
          
ggarrange(plt_n50_hybrid_xil, plt_genfrac_hybrid_xil,
          plt_busco_diff_hybrid_xil + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-4,0)),
          plt_len_err_hybrid_xil,
          plt_mism_hybrid_xil + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,10)),
          plt_indel_hybrid_xil + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,3)),
          ncol=2, nrow=3, labels=c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: figS5_strategy_hybrid_metrics_sup
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig-cap: "Figure S3: Complete assembly quality metrics for hybrid assembly strategies. Panels show (A) BUSCO difference, (B) mismatches per 100 kbp, and (C) indels per 100 kbp for each assembly program as a function of nanopore sequencing depth. X-axis indicates short-reads depth, and alpha transparency indicates long-reads depth."

ggarrange(plt_busco_diff_hybrid_xil,
          plt_mism_hybrid_xil,
          plt_indel_hybrid_xil,
          ncol=1, nrow=3, labels=c("A", "B", "C"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig7_strategy_polished_hybrid_resource
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig-cap: "Figure 5: Resource usage per Mbp of assembly for polished and hybrid assembly strategies. Panels show (A) run time per Mbp of reference and (B) maximum RAM usage per Mbp of reference. Complete graphs with all depths are shown in Supplementary Figures S4 and S5."

plotA <- plt_time_mp_hybrid_xil + scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(1,1), breaks=c(10,30,60)) +       
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,300)) +
  facet_wrap(~depth_np, labeller = labeller(depth_np = ~ paste0("Long-reads ", .x, "x"))) +
  guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=2), alpha="none") + guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=1, reverse=T))

plotB <- plt_ram_mb_hybrid_xil + scale_alpha_continuous(name="Depth long-reads (x)", range=c(1,1), breaks=c(10,30,60)) +
  facet_wrap(~depth_np, labeller = labeller(depth_np = ~ paste0("Long-reads ", .x, "x"))) +
  guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=2), alpha="none") + guides(color=guide_legend(nrow=1, reverse=T))

ggarrange(plotA, plotB,
          nrow=2, labels=c("A", "B"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")

```

```{r}
#| label: figS6_strategy_polished_hybrid_resource_sup1
#| fig.width: 15
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig-cap: "Supplementary Figure S4: Run time per Mbp of assembly for polished and hybrid assembly strategies. Panels indicate distinct long-reads depths: A-10x, B-15x, C-20x, D-25x, E-30x, F-35x, G-40x, H-50X, I-60X. This is the complete version of Figure 5A."

plt <- plt_time_mp_hybrid_xil_full + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,300)) +
  facet_wrap(~depth_np, labeller = labeller(depth_np = ~ paste0("Long-reads ", .x, "x"))) +
       theme(legend.position="bottom",
             legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

egg::tag_facet(plt,
        x = -Inf, y = 320,
        open = "", close = "",
        tag_pool = LETTERS) + theme(strip.text = element_text())
```

```{r}
#| label: figS7_strategy_polished_hybrid_resource_sup2
#| fig.width: 15
#| fig.height: 12
#| fig-cap: "Supplementary Figure S5: Maximum RAM usage per Mbp of assembly for polished and hybrid assembly strategies. Panels indicate distinct long-reads depths: A-10x, B-15x, C-20x, D-25x, E-30x, F-35x, G-40x, H-50x, I-60x, J-75x, H-100x. This is the complete version of Figure 5B."

plt <- plt_ram_mb_hybrid_xil_full + facet_wrap(~depth_np, labeller = labeller(depth_np = ~ paste0("Long-reads ", .x, "x")),
                                               nrow = 4,  ncol = 3) +
       theme(legend.position="bottom",
             legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

egg::tag_facet(plt,
        x = -Inf, y = 0.90,
        open = "", close = "",
        tag_pool = LETTERS) + theme(strip.text = element_text())
```
